name: Chicken-Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 oz.) diced tomatoes with green chiles, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, bring the first 8 ingredients to a boil.
2. Cover and reduce heat, then simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients (chicken and seasonings).
4. Mix together the flour and 1/4 cup water until smooth.
5. Stir the flour mixture into the chicken mixture.
6. Bring to a boil, then cover and reduce heat.
7. Simmer, stirring often, for 6 to 8 minutes or until thickened.
8. Yield: 12 cups
Prep time: 15 minutes
Cook time: 38 minutes
